General.Name: Ziprecruiter Inc
General.Description: ZipRecruiter, Inc. operates an online marketplace that connects job seekers and employers in the United States and internationally. Its two-sided marketplace enables employers to post jobs and access other features, as well as the job seekers that apply to jobs with a single click. The company was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Santa Monica, California.
General.Address: 3000 Ocean Park Blvd., Santa Monica, CA, United States, 90405
